# Images for the project page

Drop these files here and the project page will render them automatically
(until then, dashed placeholders are shown):

- `teaser.png`   — headline result: multi-view RGB-D input + predicted fill level
- `pipeline.png` — full method diagram (Blender render → multi-view RGB-D → ViT → fill level)
- `results.png`  — qualitative (pred vs GT) and/or a quantitative table

Recommended width: ~1200px. PNG or JPG. GIFs also work for `teaser`.
